title: Pallet Rack Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing pallet rack storage efficiency, throughput, and structural integrity based on ISO 9001, Lean Warehousing, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Rack Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Total vertical storage height per rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total vertical storage height per rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir raf bölmesinin toplam dikey depolama yüksekliği, yüksek raflı depolarda tipik olarak 3-18 m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte vertikale Lagerhöhe pro Regalfach, typischerweise 3-18 m in Hochregallagern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de stockage vertical totale par alvéole de rack, généralement 3-18 m dans les entrepôts à haute densité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura total de almacenamiento vertical por bahía de estante, típicamente 3-18 m en almacenes de altura

inputs.label: Pallet Depth (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard pallet depth (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard pallet depth (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart palet derinliği (örneğin, EUR palet 1200 mm, ABD palet 1200 mm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Palettentiefe (z. B. EUR-Palette 1200 mm, US-Palette 1200 mm)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur standard de la palette (ex. palette EUR 1200 mm, palette US 1200 mm).
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad estándar de la paleta (ej., paleta EUR 1200 mm, paleta US 1200 mm)

inputs.label: Pallet Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard pallet width (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard pallet width (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart palet genişliği (örneğin, EUR palet 800 mm, ABD palet 1000 mm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Palettenbreite (z. B. EUR-Palette 800 mm, US-Palette 1000 mm)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur standard de la palette (ex. palette EUR 800 mm, palette US 1000 mm).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho estándar de la paleta (ej., paleta EUR 800 mm, paleta US 1000 mm)

inputs.label: Pallet Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Height of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Palet tabanı dahil tek bir yüklü paletin yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe einer einzelnen beladenen Palette inklusive Palettenunterbau
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur d'une palette chargée, y compris la base de la palette.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de una paleta cargada incluyendo la base de la paleta

inputs.label: Beam Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Vertical thickness of horizontal load beams, affects usable height per level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical thickness of horizontal load beams, affects usable height per level.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatay yük kirişlerinin dikey kalınlığı, seviye başına kullanılabilir yüksekliği etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Dicke der horizontalen Lastträger, beeinflusst die nutzbare Höhe pro Ebene
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur verticale des traverses de charge horizontales, affecte la hauteur utile par niveau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Grosor vertical de las vigas de carga horizontales, afecta la altura utilizable por nivel

inputs.label: Vertical Clearance (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Palet üstü ile bir sonraki kiriş arasında, taşıma ekipmanı için güvenlik boşluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheitsabstand zwischen Palettenoberkante und nächstem Träger für Fördergeräte
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart de sécurité entre le haut de la palette et la poutre suivante pour l'équipement de manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espacio de seguridad entre la parte superior de la paleta y la siguiente viga para equipos de manipulación

inputs.label: Aisle Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Width of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, per OSHA/ISO 3691.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, per OSHA/ISO 3691.
businessContext_i18n.tr: OSHA/ISO 3691'e göre raf sıraları arasındaki forklift geçiş koridoru genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des Gabelstapler-Durchfahrtsgangs zwischen Regalreihen, gemäß OSHA/ISO 3691.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de l'allée de circulation du chariot élévateur entre les rangées de rayonnages, selon OSHA/ISO 3691.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del pasillo de circulación de montacargas entre filas de estanterías, según OSHA/ISO 3691.

inputs.label: Rack Bay Length (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal length of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

label_i18n.es: Longitud de la bahía de estantería (mm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal length of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir raf bölmesinin yatay uzunluğu (dikmelerin merkezinden merkezine).
businessContext_i18n.de: Horizontale Länge eines einzelnen Regalfeldes (Mitte-zu-Mitte der Ständer).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur horizontale d'une travée de rayonnage unique (centre à centre des montants).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud horizontal de una bahía de estantería individual (de centro a centro de los montantes).

rules.message: VNA forklifts require aisle width >= 2800 mm. Current aisle width may cause operational issues.
High seismic zone with rack height >12m requires additional cross-aisle bracing per ASCE 7.
Utilization above 90% may reduce pick efficiency and increase congestion.

thresholds.message: Beam deflection exceeds L/180 limit. Reduce pallet weight or increase beam section modulus.
Vertical space utilization exceeds 95% - risk of clearance violations.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
